## Patient dosing summary

| Patient ID | Age (months) | Weight (kg) | Dose (mg/kg) | Calculated dose (mg) | Frequency | Next dose | PK clearance (mL/min) | Notes |

## Quick take
- **CU-001:** Stable on current regimen.
- **CU-002:** Continuing to respond well; no obvious dosing concern in the current file.
- **CU-003:** Newly enrolled; currently on the most frequent schedule of the three patients.

## PK model status note
Based on the latest dosing config, **there are no obvious red flags in the currently assigned PK-based dosing parameters**. The dose levels, frequencies, and clearance values look internally consistent for the three compassionate-use patients.

That said, this assessment is based on the **configuration snapshot only**. A full statement that the PK models are stable would require review of current monitoring outputs or recent model-validation logs.",
